title: Hardly/Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V-ed

formulas.formula: Hardly/Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when/before + S + V-ed
formulas.zh: 倒裝句型，表達「幾乎還沒……就……」，強調兩個動作幾乎同時發生

formulas.formula: Hardly/Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + than + S + V-ed
formulas.zh: 同義用法，用 than 替代 when/before，表達相同意思

explanation: 此句型為強調倒裝結構，將 Hardly 或 Scarcely 置句首以表達「剛好……就……」的時間上的緊密關聯。主句使用過去完成時（had + p.p.），強調第一個動作發生於第二個動作之前，但兩者幾乎同時。when/before 後的從句使用簡單過去時，不發生倒裝。此句型常用於敘事文中製造戲劇效果，或在考試中測試學生對時態與倒裝的掌握。易混淆點：不可在 when/before 從句中倒裝；hardly/scarcely 後必須是完成時。

examples.eng: Hardly had she finished her homework when her mother called for dinner.
examples.chi: 她幾乎還沒做完功課，她媽媽就叫她吃飯。

examples.eng: Scarcely had the meeting begun before the fire alarm went off.
examples.chi: 會議幾乎才開始，火警警報就響了。

examples.eng: Hardly had we arrived at the airport when the plane was announced delayed.
examples.chi: 我們幾乎才到機場，飛機就被宣布延誤了。

examples.eng: Scarcely had he taken his seat than the lights went out in the cinema.
examples.chi: 他幾乎才坐下，電影院的燈就滅了。

extension.tip: 判斷此句型的關鍵：(1) 句首必為 Hardly/Scarcely；(2) 第二個動詞必為過去完成時態；(3) when/before/than 後為簡單過去時，不倒裝；(4) 若未倒裝或時態錯誤則非此句型。常見錯誤為在 when 從句中也進行倒裝，或使用現在完成時。

examples.test: Hardly had she arrived when he came.
examples.result: → 正確。主句倒裝（had arrived），從句正常語序（he came）

examples.test: Hardly she had arrived when he came.
examples.result: → 錯誤。缺少倒裝結構，應為 Hardly had she arrived

examples.test: Scarcely had the game started than he scored.
examples.result: → 正確。用 than 替代 when，保持倒裝和過去完成時

extension.note: 「Hardly/Scarcely + had」必倒裝；「when/before/than」後從句不倒裝，時態簡單過去——倒裝、完成、簡單過去，三步不能亂。

parts: had the doctor arrived when the patient woke up.
exercises.sentence: Hardly had the doctor arrived when the patient woke up.
exercises.translation: 醫生幾乎才到達，病人就醒了。

exercises.sentence: Scarcely had she finished speaking when everyone started applauding.
exercises.translation: 她幾乎才說完，大家就開始鼓掌。

parts: the room than the power went out.
exercises.sentence: Hardly had he entered the room than the power went out.
exercises.translation: 他幾乎才進房間，電就停了。

parts: had we left home before it started raining heavily.
exercises.sentence: Scarcely had we left home before it started raining heavily.
exercises.translation: 我們幾乎才離家，就開始下大雨了。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的倒裝結構，表達「剛完成就……」的意思
mc_exercises.question_eng: Hardly had he finished breakfast _______ the doorbell rang.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（when）。此句型為「Hardly/Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V」，表達兩個動作幾乎同時發生。when 後接簡單過去時從句，不倒裝。B 項 than 用於比較級結構；C 項 before he 產生句子結構錯誤；D 項 and then 為連接詞而非時間連接詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，使用 Scarcely 倒裝結構表達緊密時間關係
mc_exercises.question_eng: Scarcely had the train left the station _______ a passenger realized he had left his luggage behind.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（when）。此句為「Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V」的標準用法。when 引導時間從句，從句使用簡單過去時。B 項 than 用於「Scarcely...than」結構，但本題前面已有 Scarcely 倒裝；C 項 before 用法不同；D 項 as soon as 雖可表時間但不符此句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷哪個選項正確完成倒裝句，注意時態與連接詞搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: Hardly had she announced her resignation _______ employees began circulating rumors about her departure.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（when）。此句型中，when 後接的從句須使用簡單過去時，不倒裝。B 項錯誤因為 than 後不應接 she had；C 項 before they had 使用過去完成時，違反句型規則；D 項 when had 在 when 從句中產生不必要的倒裝。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確選項完成倒裝句，並注意與「before」的差異用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: Scarcely had the director finished explaining the new project _______ someone raised an objection that changed the entire direction of the meeting.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（when）。標準「Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V」句型中，when 連接時間從句。B 項 than 可用於「Scarcely...than」但通常用於比較；C 項 before 也可用但語意上 when 表示「正好就在那時」更符合劇情；D 項在 when 從句中倒裝為誤用。本題需掌握 when 的標準用法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我剛坐下，老師就宣布了考試成績。
translation_exercises.answer: Hardly had I sat down when the teacher announced the exam results.
key_points: Hardly + had + p.p. 倒裝結構
hints: 句型框架：Hardly + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V-ed
注意：when 從句不倒裝，且用簡單過去時，不能寫成 when the teacher had announced

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 電影才開始，觀眾的手機就響了起來。
translation_exercises.answer: Scarcely had the movie started when the audience's cell phone rang.
key_points: Scarcely 替代 Hardly 表達同樣含義
had started 為過去完成時
when 從句用簡單過去時 rang
hints: 句型框架：Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V-ed
注意：主句強調『已經開始』，從句表『之後立即發生』，時間關係清晰

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他們還沒有出發去旅行，暴雨就突然來臨，迫使他們取消計畫。
translation_exercises.answer: Hardly had they set out for the trip when a sudden downpour came, forcing them to cancel their plans.
key_points: Hardly + had + p.p. 倒裝表強調
set out for 的過去完成式 (had set out)
forcing them 為現在分詞片語，補充說明後續結果
hints: 句型框架：Hardly + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V-ed + 附加片語
注意：when 從句可延伸為複雜句型，但倒裝仍只在主句，從句保持正常語序

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 醫生剛檢查完他的傷口，病人就開始抱怨疼痛加劇，這讓醫護人員感到困擾。
translation_exercises.answer: Scarcely had the doctor examined his wound when the patient began complaining about worsening pain, which disturbed the medical staff.
key_points: Scarcely + had + p.p. 倒裝結構表時間緊密連結
examined 為及物動詞的過去分詞
which 引導關係子句補充說明整個情況
begin complaining about 為從句動詞短語
hints: 句型框架：Scarcely + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V-ed，後可接附加子句擴展訊息
注意：which 子句修飾整個前文事件，不影響倒裝句型的核心結構；when 從句中 begin complaining 保持簡單過去時
